platform: xAI Responses API and Grok custom connectors

responses_api_tool.server_description: Use before recommending enter, launch, pilot, invest, fund, partner, procure, deploy, lend, expand, or scale in an African or high-context market when relational evidence may change the decision.

approval_boundary: xAI does not currently support require_approval on its OpenAI-compatible remote-MCP path. The dedicated endpoint therefore exposes only five read-only tools, and the Responses API recipe also retains allowed_tools as defense in depth.
verification_boundary: The xAI Responses API remote-MCP path passed a controlled three-case Grok 4.5 canary using the same five-tool set. The dedicated read-only endpoint is ready for custom-connector testing, but Grok.com installation, mobile, Grok on X, catalogue placement, Business provisioning, ordinary-chat automatic selection, and the frozen 40-case observatory remain unverified or not run.
production_boundary: The endpoint is the public sandbox. Licensed production Streamable HTTP MCP is not yet public.
